# Agent Guidelines

This document contains important guidelines for AI agents working on this project.

## Code Changes

### Always Add Tests
- Every new feature or bug fix MUST include corresponding tests
- Follow the existing test structure and naming conventions
- Place tests in the appropriate directory within the `test/` folder
- Ensure tests are comprehensive and cover edge cases

## File Creation Restrictions

### Do NOT Add New Files For:

#### Documentation
- Do not create new documentation files
- Update existing documentation files if needed
- Keep documentation minimal and focused

#### Examples
- Do not create new example files
- Use existing example structures in the `test/` directory
- Examples should be part of tests, not separate files

#### Implementation Details
- Do not create new files for implementation details
- Keep implementation changes within existing file structures
- Refactor existing files rather than creating new ones
- Only create new files when absolutely necessary for core functionality

## Summary

When working on this project:
1. ✅ Always write tests for your changes
2. ❌ Don't add documentation files
3. ❌ Don't add example files
4. ❌ Don't add files for implementation details

Focus on maintaining the existing structure and keeping the codebase lean and well-tested.
